sourceContext.originPage: EOFY Marketplace collection / product listing page (PLP)

contentPattern.structure: toolbar (filter + marketplace toggle + result count + sort) + responsive product grid (image + status/seller badges + online-only flag + title + price + add-to-bag, one interspersed promo tile) + pagination
contentPattern.perTile: image + optional status badge (Trending Now / Clearance) + seller badge (Marketplace / Officeworks / Multiple sellers / Kmart) + 'Online only' flag + title + price (optional was/strike) + Add-to-bag
contentPattern.interspersedPromo: OnePass promo tile at grid index 7

suitableFor: collection pages with a filterable, sortable, paginated product grid
search results grids with result count + toolbar + pagination
notSuitableFor: static category/feature tile grids without filter/sort/pagination (use cards-product)
